knowledge_texts:
The pyhealthcheck grammar defines rules: pyhealthcheck, py_system_status, py_resource_status, py_network_status, py_check_kernel, py_check_uptime, py_check_services, py_check_cpu, py_check_memory, py_check_disk, py_check_processes, py_check_ports.
A pyhealthcheck is defined as py_system_status py_resource_status py_network_status.
A py_system_status is defined as py_check_kernel py_check_uptime py_check_services.
A py_resource_status is defined as py_check_cpu py_check_memory py_check_disk py_check_processes.
A py_network_status is defined as py_check_ports.
A py_check_kernel is defined as "py_check_kernel".
A py_check_uptime is defined as "py_check_uptime".
A py_check_services is defined as "py_check_services".
A py_check_cpu is defined as "py_check_cpu".
A py_check_memory is defined as "py_check_memory".
A py_check_disk is defined as "py_check_disk".
A py_check_processes is defined as "py_check_processes".
A py_check_ports is defined as "py_check_ports".

The healthcheck grammar defines rules: healthcheck, system_status, resource_status, network_status, check_kernel, check_uptime, check_services, check_cpu, check_memory, check_disk, check_processes, check_ports.
A healthcheck is defined as system_status resource_status network_status.
A system_status is defined as check_kernel check_uptime check_services.
A resource_status is defined as check_cpu check_memory check_disk check_processes.
A network_status is defined as check_ports.
A check_kernel is defined as "check_kernel".
A check_uptime is defined as "check_uptime".
A check_services is defined as "check_services".
A check_cpu is defined as "check_cpu".
A check_memory is defined as "check_memory".
A check_disk is defined as "check_disk".
A check_processes is defined as "check_processes".
A check_ports is defined as "check_ports".
